description: S3 bucket: only S3Bucket is imported (S3BucketPolicy is not CFN-importable and is created fresh). Bucket name is known from resolved params so no stack lookup is needed.

phase2_resources.reason: Not CFN-importable. Deleted at Phase 1.5 cleanup, then created fresh by Phase 2 UPDATE. Uses Fn::ImportValue on VpcId so must be recreated after VPC stack exports are live.
